title: Already-clear maintenance notice
skillStatus: Current and structurally valid; not installed
verdict: No candidate change improves the notice without adding unsupported meaning.
scope: Review a short maintenance notice for consequential clarity issues.
protectedMeaning: The maintenance window begins at 02:00 UTC.
Customers do not need to take action.

evidenceBoundaries.label: Reviewed source
evidenceBoundaries.detail: The complete maintenance notice supplied for review.

finalOutput.heading: No change recommended
finalOutput.content: Scheduled maintenance begins at 02:00 UTC on 18 August. Service may be briefly unavailable. No customer action is required.

method.decisionSummary: The notice was tested for missing actions, timing ambiguity, unsupported certainty, and altered responsibility.
method.noChangeReason: Every alternative was cosmetic and would increase length without improving a reader decision.
